headline: A Look At Ameriprise Financial’s (AMP) Valuation After Q1 2026 Results And New Advisor Addition
summary: Ameriprise Financial (AMP) is back in focus after Q1 2026 results showed higher net income and revenue, and the firm also added Strickoff Financial Services with nearly $140 million in client assets. See our latest analysis for Ameriprise Financial. The Q1 2026 update and new advisor additions come after a mixed run for the stock, with a 30 day share price return of 6.2% and a 90 day share price return decline of 15.5%. The 5 year total shareholder return of 94.6% points to stronger long term...
